2604.13849.title: MCPThreatHive: Automated Threat Intelligence for Model Context Protocol Ecosystems
2604.13849.paper_summary: The rapid proliferation of Model Context Protocol (MCP)-based agentic systems has introduced a new category of security threats that existing frameworks are inadequately equipped to address. We present MCPThreatHive, an open-source platform that automates the end-to-end lifecycle of MCP threat intelligence: from continuous, multi-source data collection through AI-driven threat extraction and classification, to structured knowledge graph storage and interactive visualization. The platform operationalizes the MCP-38 threat taxonomy, a curated set of 38 MCP-specific threat patterns mapped to STRIDE, OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications, and OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications. A composite risk scoring model provides quantitative prioritization. Through a comparative analysis of representative existing MCP security tools, we identify three critical coverage gaps that MCPThreatHive addresses: incomplete compositional attack modeling, absence of continuous threat intelligence, and lack of unified multi-framework classification.
2604.13849.paper_summary_zh: MCP（模型上下文協議）為基礎的代理系統的快速增長引入了一類新的安全威脅，而現有框架無法充分應對這些威脅。<lb/>我們提出了MCPThreatHive，一個開源平台，能自動化MCP威脅情報的端到端生命周期：從持續的多來源數據收集，到基於AI的威脅提取和分類，再到結構化知識圖譜存儲和互動可視化。<lb/>該平台實現了MCP-38威脅分類法，這是一組經過策劃的38個MCP特定威脅模式，映射到STRIDE、LLM應用的OWASP前10名和代理應用的OWASP前10名。<lb/>一個綜合風險評分模型提供了定量優先級排序。<lb/>通過對代表性現有MCP安全工具的比較分析，我們識別了MCPThreatHive所解決的三個關鍵覆蓋缺口：不完整的組合攻擊建模、缺乏持續的威脅情報，以及缺乏統一的多框架分類。
2604.13849.author: Yi Ting Shen et.al.
2604.13849.authors: Yi Ting Shen, Kentaroh Toyoda, Alex Leung
